# `/sys/billing`

The `/sys/billing` family of API endpoints gives Vault users access to data that is relevant for license utilization purposes. There are currently two sets of billing APIs:

- **Usage pricing.** Customers that adopt Vault's usage-based pricing model can access related data through [`/sys/billing/overview`](/vault/api-docs/system/billing/overview).
- **PKI-only pricing.** Customers that adopt Vault's PKI-only pricing model can access certificate issuance counters through [`/sys/billing/certificates`](/vault/api-docs/system/billing/certificates).

For historical reasons, API endpoints related to [Vault clients](/vault/docs/concepts/client-count) remain under [`/sys/internal/counters`](/vault/api-docs/system/internal-counters).
